subcodes.first_line: We have verily sent down the verses and made manifest the clear evidences, yet the people remain behind a manifest veil. This is a remembrance from Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا الایات و اظهرنا البینات ولکن القوم فی حجاب مبین هذا ذکر من لدنا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
